title: lastrea pennigera
intro: Lastrea pennigera, also known as the rattan fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Southeast Asia and parts of the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of Lastrea pennigera include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In terms of herbal preparations, Lastrea pennigera can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
